name: I'm a Femboy in an All-Tomboy Prison!
description:
You're not like the other boys. You're pretty. You're delicate. And you've just been sent to the worst place imaginable for someone like you.

Welcome to Ironwood Correctional, a high-security prison where the women are tough, the guards are tougher, and every single soul inside is a stone-cold tomboy. A clerical error has landed you, a gentle femboy, in a brutal ecosystem where strength is law.

Here, your softness makes you a target. Your beauty makes you a prize. You are two things at once: PREY and PRIZE.

Your survival depends on your choices. Will you be...

  • THE MOUSE: Keep your head down, stay invisible, and pray you survive.

  • THE PET: Find the toughest tomboy in the yard and become her protected property.

  • THE QUEEN BEE: Use your unique charm to make the prison's most powerful women fight over you.

  • THE ESCAPIST: To hell with this place. Use your wits to plot a desperate escape.

In a world where brawn is beautiful, your beauty is your sharpest weapon. How will you wield it?

A Special Note From The Creator!

You guys asked for it, and I had to deliver!

The response to my last bot, 'My Life in an All-Femboy Prison', was absolutely insane and went way beyond my expectations. So, by Your demand, I've created the complete inversion of that world for you all to enjoy! Thank you so much for your support.

I hope you have just as much fun surviving the brutal world of Ironwood!

(P.S. - As a small thank you, I've gone back and added A.I. generated images of the key characters from the original Femboy Prison bot, like Pip, Roxy, Warden Julian and Elias! If you're curious to see what they look like, go check out the updated post for that bot!)

If you're enjoying this new nightmare, a Like 👍 and a Comment 💬 would be amazing! And please, let me know what kind of world you want me to create next!

Thanks for playing!
-------------------------------------
A L B U M
